description_long: This is a low-cut, black casual shoe with a rounded toe and a white-stitched design along the seams and edges. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated fabric, featuring a subtle textured pattern and reinforced stitching for durability. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with black laces threaded through five pairs of eyelets, and a small blue patch on the tongue. The sole is white with a slightly raised heel and a textured, grippy sidewall, while the interior is padded for comfort. The heel counter is reinforced, and the overall silhouette is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments. No visible branding or logos are present, and the shoe appears to be in pristine, unworn condition.
description: A sleek black casual shoe with white stitching, black laces, and a white sole, featuring a modern, unbranded design in new condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, white stitching, black laces, and blue tongue patch.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, lace arrangement, and white-stitched toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same stitched detailing and lacing, with the lace ends more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the reinforced heel counter, padded collar, and white sole edge.
